positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunrise sky. The mountains should feature sharp, geometric peaks and deep, saturated indigo and burnt orange colors, creating a high-contrast, graphic effect. Include subtle, stylized crescent moons and stylized constellations dusted across the sky. The composition must be centrally focused and clean, optimized for printing on a flat surface like fabric. Vector art quality, negative space utilization, ethereal glow, dramatic depth, clean lines, bold graphic design.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, blurry, artifact, noise, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, grayscale, realistic photo, photorealism
